name: Hegemony Supply Wagon

authorization.integrationInstruction: On 2026-07-18, the Warpkeep project owner instructed the new Gold Wagon integration PR to use all available project assets.
authorization.scope: This authorizes the named, checked-in Wagon runtime outputs in the public Warpkeep repository and an eventual official Warpkeep Pages runtime after separately approved deployment for the reviewed Gold expedition feature; it is use authorization only, not deployment approval.
authorization.limitations: It does not establish underlying ownership, grant a separate public/open-content license, general derivative or redistribution rights, trademark rights, or any server authority, currency, reward, entitlement, node-placement, or routing right.

selectedSource.selectionReason: The no-telescope GameReady payload is the supplied animated runtime-reference variant and avoids shipping the telescope-only cargo difference.

safety: The fetcher permits only the checksum-pinned GitHub release attachment and approved one-hop GitHub payload hosts.

Preparation rejects symlinked archives/tools, changed archive membership, path traversal, path normalization collisions, archive links, unexpected source hashes, external URIs, unexpected cameras, changed skin/animation contracts, and stale atomic installation state.
Ordinary application builds do not fetch or rewrite the release source.

runtimeContract.rendering: The GLB is not centered at its scene origin after decode. Renderers must calculate the loaded object bounds and center/ground a private wrapper group; never rewrite the immutable runtime asset at frame time.
runtimeContract.collision: Use an engine-side footprint roughly 2.1m wide by 4.2m long and 2.6m visual clearance. Never use animated render geometry for collision.

animation.rootMotion: in_place; world position is an interpolation of server-owned journey timestamps, not animation data

lodPolicy.animationBudget: cap active animated wagons at 4 desktop/2 mobile for high/balanced and 12 desktop/6 mobile total; pause or render static when budget is exceeded

runtimeAssets.derivation: source WebP atlases resized deterministically to 512px, then gltfpack 1.2 with -cc -si 0.55 -se 0.008 -sp -vp 14 -vn 10 -vt 12 -kn -km -ke -af 30
source WebP atlases resized deterministically to 256px, then gltfpack 1.2 with -cc -si 0.25 -se 0.014 -sp -vp 14 -vn 10 -vt 12 -kn -km -ke -af 30

scopeBoundary: This model record provides only visual and animation assets. SpacetimeDB authoritative sites, occupation leases, travel, settlement, Gold balances, visibility, dispatch authorization, and release policy are established independently by reviewed server/application code.
